sourceSections: Omni AI Analytics and the Semantic Layer
The Evolution of Blobby: From Single-Shot to Agentic AI
Consolidating the Brain and SQL Generation

sections.lead: Claude greatly enhanced Omni's engineering velocity and culture, leading to increased commits and rapid skill development across the team.

bullets.label: Code Velocity
bullets.text: Omni saw a notable increase in commits to the main branch after the release of Claude Code with the OS model.

bullets.label: CTO Contribution
bullets.text: Claude even allowed Omni's CTO to continue contributing code, which was an unexpected benefit.

bullets.label: Skill Development
bullets.text: The engineering team rapidly skilled up in AI tools by January due to Claude consistently providing real help.

bullets.label: Public Demos
bullets.text: Omni releases public demo features every Friday, showcasing their "ship it" and transparency values.

sections.lead: Omni's platform utilizes Claude and a crucial semantic layer to allow users to interact with complex enterprise data via natural language queries.

bullets.label: Natural Language
bullets.text: Omni's platform enables users to interact with their data using natural language, translating questions into semantic queries via Claude.

bullets.label: Semantic Layer
bullets.text: A crucial semantic layer sits atop data warehouses or databases, acting as a translation layer for queries.

bullets.label: Data Curation
bullets.text: This layer curates data and provides a map for translating queries into SQL, handling vast enterprise data sets.

bullets.label: Terminology Ambiguity
bullets.text: The semantic layer resolves business terminology ambiguities, such as "last quarter" having different meanings across departments.

sections.lead: Omni's AI agent, Blobby, evolved over 18 months from a single-shot system to an agentic AI with improved context and error recovery.

bullets.label: Blobby Evolution
bullets.text: Omni's AI agent, Blobby, significantly evolved over 18 months from an initial single-question, single-answer system.

bullets.label: Context Metadata
bullets.text: Early improvements included adding "AI context," "sample queries," and a "taste of values" to guide LLM interpretation.

bullets.label: Agentic Loop
bullets.text: The next major leap was adding an agentic loop with a custom harness to enable Blobby to recover from errors.

bullets.label: Claude Upgrade
bullets.text: The transition from Claude Haiku to Sonnet further unlocked more complex, elaborate agentic conversations for Blobby.

sections.lead: Omni resolved Blobby's "split brain" issue and enhanced SQL generation by consolidating knowledge into the outer agent and utilizing raw SQL.

bullets.label: Split Brain Fix
bullets.text: Omni addressed a "split brain" problem where an outer agent and a sub-agent had misaligned knowledge regarding query generation.

bullets.label: Knowledge Consolidation
bullets.text: The solution involved "consolidating the brain" by pulling all tools and knowledge into the outer agent to eliminate unpredictable behavior.

bullets.label: SQL Engine Revival
bullets.text: Omni revived an old, discarded SQL parsing engine to improve query generation capabilities.

bullets.label: Raw SQL
bullets.text: Allowing Claude to generate raw SQL with parsing guidelines enabled Blobby to answer complex questions efficiently in single queries.

sections.lead: Omni's agentic system features advanced capabilities, including data modeling, and relies heavily on internal and customer evaluation for quality.

bullets.label: Agentic Structure
bullets.text: Omni's current agentic system features an outer loop for checkpointing and an inner loop with tools for dashboards and visualizations.

bullets.label: Data Modeling
bullets.text: The inner loop's growing set of tools now includes capabilities for performing data modeling to improve the semantic layer.

bullets.label: Eval Systems
bullets.text: The platform heavily relies on both internal and customer evaluation (Eval) systems to ensure predictable and consistent answer quality.

bullets.label: Trace Data
bullets.text: Evals are invaluable for the raw trace data they provide, offering deep observability into agent behavior for debugging and improvement.

bullets.label: Harness Insights
bullets.text: Using Claude Code internally helped Omni engineers understand good AI harness design, applying lessons to Blobby's development.

sections.lead: Omni's AI platform, powered by Claude, enables intelligent data interaction through iterative development, robust agentic design, and continuous evaluation.

bullets.label: Sophisticated Approach
bullets.text: Omni's AI analytics platform, powered by Claude, demonstrates a sophisticated approach to building intelligent data interaction systems.

bullets.label: Core Principles
bullets.text: The platform's journey highlights key architectural and learning principles for developing reliable LLM-powered applications.

bullets.label: Intelligent Context
bullets.text: Intelligent context management via a semantic layer is crucial to the platform's ability to 'talk to their data'.

bullets.label: Continuous Evaluation
bullets.text: Continuous evaluation ensures the reliability and high quality of Omni's LLM-powered applications.
